<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="da">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Nykøbing Mors — Oversvømmelsesscenarier</title>
<style>
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
body{font-family:'Georgia',serif;background:#f5f0e8;color:#1a1a1a}

header{padding:2rem 2rem 1rem;max-width:960px;margin:0 auto}
header h1{font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:normal;letter-spacing:-0.01em;line-height:1.3;margin-bottom:0.4rem}
header p{font-size:0.9rem;color:#555;line-height:1.6}

.scenario-bar{display:flex;gap:0;max-width:960px;margin:1rem auto 0;padding:0 2rem}
.scenario-btn{flex:1;padding:10px 6px;font-size:0.78rem;font-family:'Georgia',serif;border:1px solid #c0b090;background:#fff;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;color:#555;text-align:center;line-height:1.3}
.scenario-btn:first-child{border-radius:4px 0 0 4px}
.scenario-btn:last-child{border-radius:0 4px 4px 0}
.scenario-btn+.scenario-btn{border-left:none}
.scenario-btn.active{background:#1a3a5c;color:#fff;border-color:#1a3a5c}
.scenario-btn strong{display:block;font-size:0.95rem;font-weight:normal}

.map-container{max-width:960px;margin:1rem auto;padding:0 2rem}

.slider-wrap{
  position:relative;
  width:100%;
  padding-bottom:92%;
  border-radius:4px;
  overflow:hidden;
  cursor:col-resize;
  box-shadow:0 2px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
  user-select:none;
  touch-action:none;
}

.map-img{
  position:absolute;
  top:0;left:0;
  width:100%;height:100%;
  object-fit:cover;
  display:block;
}

#img-after{
  z-index:2;
  clip-path:inset(0 50% 0 0);
}
#img-before{z-index:1;}

.divider-line{
  position:absolute;
  top:0;bottom:0;
  width:3px;
  background:#fff;
  left:50%;
  transform:translateX(-50%);
  z-index:10;
  pointer-events:none;
  box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
}

.handle{
  position:absolute;
  top:50%;left:50%;
  transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
  width:48px;height:48px;
  background:#c0392b;
  border-radius:50%;
  z-index:11;
  pointer-events:none;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  box-shadow:0 2px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
}

.map-label{
  position:absolute;
  top:16px;
  z-index:12;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,0.92);
  padding:5px 12px;
  border-radius:2px;
  font-size:0.75rem;
  letter-spacing:0.05em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  color:#333;
  pointer-events:none;
  font-family:'Georgia',serif;
}
.label-before{left:16px}
.label-after{right:16px}

.flood-label{
  position:absolute;
  bottom:16px;right:16px;
  z-index:12;
  background:rgba(10,40,100,0.85);
  color:#fff;
  padding:6px 14px;
  border-radius:2px;
  font-size:0.8rem;
  font-family:'Georgia',serif;
  pointer-events:none;
}

.stats-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px;max-width:960px;margin:1rem auto;padding:0 2rem}
.stat-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:4px;padding:0.9rem 1rem}
.stat-card .lbl{font-size:0.7rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;color:#888;margin-bottom:4px}
.stat-card .val{font-size:1.4rem;color:#1a3a5c;font-weight:normal}
.stat-card .sub{font-size:0.75rem;color:#888;margin-top:2px}

footer{max-width:960px;margin:0.5rem auto 2rem;padding:1rem 2rem 0;font-size:0.72rem;color:#999;line-height:1.6;border-top:1px solid #ddd}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<header>
  <h1>Nykøbing Mors: Sådan kan stigende vand ændre byen</h1>
  <p>Træk skillelinjen for at sammenligne byen i dag med fremtidige oversvømmelsesscenarier (2070–2100). Data fra KAMP-værktøjet på klimatilpasning.dk og DMI Klimaatlas SSP3-7.0.</p>
</header>

<div class="scenario-bar">
  <button class="scenario-btn active" onclick="setScenario(0)"><strong>I dag</strong>Ingen stigning</button>
  <button class="scenario-btn" onclick="setScenario(1)"><strong>20-års hændelse</strong>Vandstand 2,08 m</button>
  <button class="scenario-btn" onclick="setScenario(2)"><strong>50-års hændelse</strong>Vandstand 2,12 m</button>
  <button class="scenario-btn" onclick="setScenario(3)"><strong>100-års hændelse</strong>Vandstand 2,14 m</button>
</div>

<div class="map-container">
  <div class="slider-wrap" id="wrap">
    <img id="img-before" class="map-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Basiskort uden oversvømmelse"/>
    <img id="img-after"  class="map-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Oversvømmelsesscenarie"/>
    <div class="divider-line" id="divLine"></div>
    <div class="handle" id="handle">
      <svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 22 22" fill="none">
        <path d="M7 5L2 11L7 17M15 5L20 11L15 17" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <div class="map-label label-before">Nu</div>
    <div class="map-label label-after" id="afterLabel">Vælg scenarie</div>
    <div class="flood-label" id="floodLabel">Vælg scenarie ovenfor</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="stats-row">
  <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="lbl">Vandstand</div>
    <div class="val" id="stat-rise">—</div>
    <div class="sub">Limfjorden ved Thisted</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="lbl">Bygninger i fare</div>
    <div class="val" id="stat-bldg">—</div>
    <div class="sub">af ca. 4.800 i Nykøbing Mors</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="lbl">Andel af byen</div>
    <div class="val" id="stat-pct">—</div>
    <div class="sub" id="stat-pct-sub"> </div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="lbl">Forventet skade</div>
    <div class="val" id="stat-dmg">—</div>
    <div class="sub">kr. (78.100 kr./bygning, Rambøll/PLASK)</div>
  </div>
</div>

<footer>
  Kortdata: © KAMP-værktøjet, klimatilpasning.dk · © SDFI Danmarks Højdemodel · © OpenStreetMap-bidragydere. Vandstandsscenarier: DMI Klimaatlas SSP3-7.0, periode 2070–2100, Limfjorden ved Thisted. Bygningstal for Nykøbing-området: Rambøll (2019), <em>Thyborøn Kanal og Vestlige Limfjord — Del 3: Socioøkonomisk screening</em>, C2C Climate Change Coastal Communities. Skadesestimat: 78.100 kr. per oversvømmet bygning baseret på PLASK-priskatalog. Bygningstal for 20- og 50-års hændelser er estimater interpoleret fra Rambølls analyse.
</footer>

<script>
const imgs = {
  basis: "data:image/png;base64,",
  m20:   "data:image/png;base64,",
  m50:   "data:image/png;base64,",
  m100:  "data:image/png;base64,",
};

const scenarios = [
  {key:'basis', label:'I dag',            floodLabel:'Ingen oversvømmelse',              rise:'—',      bldg:'0',     pct:'0%',  dmg:'—',          pctSub:'Ingen risiko'},
  {key:'m20',   label:'20-års hændelse',  floodLabel:'20-års hændelse · 2,08 m · SSP3-7.0',  rise:'2,08 m', bldg:'1.240', pct:'26%', dmg:'96,8 mio.',  pctSub:'Kystzone og lavtliggende kvarterer'},
  {key:'m50',   label:'50-års hændelse',  floodLabel:'50-års hændelse · 2,12 m · SSP3-7.0',  rise:'2,12 m', bldg:'1.600', pct:'33%', dmg:'124,9 mio.', pctSub:'Store dele af bymidten berørt'},
  {key:'m100',  label:'100-års hændelse', floodLabel:'100-års hændelse · 2,14 m · SSP3-7.0', rise:'2,14 m', bldg:'2.988', pct:'62%', dmg:'233,4 mio.', pctSub:'Størstedelen af byen under vand'},
];

let pct = 50;
let isDragging = false;

const wrap = document.getElementById('wrap');
const imgAfter = document.getElementById('img-after');
const divLine = document.getElementById('divLine');
const handle = document.getElementById('handle');

function applyClip(p) {
  pct = Math.max(2, Math.min(98, p));
  imgAfter.style.clipPath = `inset(0 ${(100-pct).toFixed(1)}% 0 0)`;
  divLine.style.left = pct + '%';
  handle.style.left = pct + '%';
}

function setScenario(idx) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.scenario-btn').forEach((b,i) => b.classList.toggle('active', i===idx));
  const s = scenarios[idx];
  imgAfter.src = imgs[s.key];
  document.getElementById('afterLabel').textContent = s.label;
  document.getElementById('floodLabel').textContent = s.floodLabel;
  document.getElementById('stat-rise').textContent = s.rise;
  document.getElementById('stat-bldg').textContent = s.bldg;
  document.getElementById('stat-pct').textContent = s.pct;
  document.getElementById('stat-pct-sub').textContent = s.pctSub;
  document.getElementById('stat-dmg').textContent = s.dmg;
}

function getP(clientX) {
  const r = wrap.getBoundingClientRect();
  return ((clientX - r.left) / r.width) * 100;
}

wrap.addEventListener('mousedown', e => { isDragging = true; applyClip(getP(e.clientX)); e.preventDefault(); });
window.addEventListener('mousemove', e => { if (isDragging) applyClip(getP(e.clientX)); });
window.addEventListener('mouseup', () => { isDragging = false; });
wrap.addEventListener('touchstart', e => { isDragging = true; applyClip(getP(e.touches[0].clientX)); }, {passive:true});
window.addEventListener('touchmove', e => { if (isDragging) applyClip(getP(e.touches[0].clientX)); }, {passive:true});
window.addEventListener('touchend', () => { isDragging = false; });

applyClip(50);
setScenario(1);
</script>
</body>
</html>
